title: 1981-04-16_Pat_155.txt
key_claims: Beauty is the mechanism the info-virus uses to beguile and enslave us to the world. Pain, suffering, and ugliness, however, awaken us and lead us to Christ. The divine call must therefore be jarring, coming from the "trash stratum" to break our hypnotic sleep.
Following a radical shift in perspective, Dick immediately abandons the paranoid Gnostic "occluding life form" model he developed in the previous chunk and returns to Taoism.

He decides the "providentia" that saved him was not an arbitrary intervention by an external God overriding the system, but rather a completely lawful "feedback loop within a unified field" operating on Taoist principles of equilibrium and compensation.
The *I Ching* demonstrates this living information system perfectly, showing the Taoist field of rest/motion modes that underlies reality, stripping away his paranoia about an evil info-virus.
recurring_concepts: **Trash Stratum**: The concept that the divine hides in the discarded, ugly, and ignored elements of reality to subvert the established (and beguiling) order of the world.
reading_excerpt: Beauty is the mechanism the info-virus uses to beguile and enslave us to the world. Pain, suffering, and ugliness, however, awaken us and lead us to Christ. The divine call must therefore be jarring, coming from the "trash stratum" to break our hypnotic sleep.
